TestSteps:
1. EDIB → Service order for installation
2. Enter service point + device
3. Record installation date + meter reading
4. Confirm installation
ExpectedResult: Meter installed at service point; initial reading recorded; billing cycle starts; device history updated

TestSteps: 1. EG31 2. Enter device 3. Save
ExpectedResult: Device installed at the designated utility premise

TestSteps: 1. EL28 2. Enter reading
ExpectedResult: Meter reading results saved and prepped for billing

TestSteps: 1. EASIBI / EA10 2. Execute
ExpectedResult: Utility bill generated based on consumed volume

TestCase: Execute physical inventory count in WM LI01
TestSteps: 1. LI01 → Create count document. 2. LI11 → Enter count. 3. LI20 → Post differences.
ExpectedResult: Count document completed; differences posted; bin stocks corrected.

PreConditions: Warehouse with stock; WM physical inventory active
TestSteps: 1. LI01 → Create physical inventory doc for bin\n2. LI11 → Enter count\n3. LI20 → Post differences
ExpectedResult: Bin stock adjusted; differences posted; IM stock synchronized with WM

TestCase: Validate storage type search for putaway

ExpectedResult: Correct storage type selected per configured search strategy.

TestCase: Validate storage type search strategy for putaway
PreConditions: Multiple storage types with capacity management
TestSteps: 1. Post GR. 2. Create TO. 3. Verify system applies correct putaway strategy.
ExpectedResult: Storage type selected per strategy; capacity constraints respected.
